---
title: "Day/Night comparison"
author:
  - Cristian Iranzo
  - Koreen Millard
  - Nicholas Pontone
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Index"
    colorlinks: true
    geometry:
      - top=30mm
      - left=30mm
      - right=30mm
      - bottom=30mm

params:
  area: "alfred"
  outdir: "results/reports"
---
# Report for `r params$area`

```{r create-global-vars}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

library(lidaynight)

# Get the path of the directory containing the actual file
# Working directory: save graphics
fpath_dir <- knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)
# fpath_dir <- getwd()

# Project directory
ROOT <- normalizePath(file.path(fpath_dir, '..', '..'), mustWork = FALSE)

# Stats directory: current mission statistics
SDIR <- file.path(ROOT, "results", "stats", params$area)

stats_files <- basename(list.files(SDIR, "*.csv$", recursive=TRUE))
available_stats_files <- names(table(stats_files))
```

```{r save-img-fc}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
save_custom_plot <- function(plot_obj, out_path) {
  
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = out_path,
    plot = plot_obj,
    device = tools::file_ext(out_path),
    width = 10,
    height = 5,
    units = "in"
  )
}
```

## ROI metrics

```{r roi-metrics}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "ROI metrics"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| warning: false

if (!"roi_stats.csv" %in% available_stats_files) {
  cat("There are no available ROI stats files.")
} else {
  stats_wide <- load_all_statistics(SDIR, "roi_stats")
  stats_long <- reshape_statistics_long(stats_wide)
  p <- make_dodged_barplot(stats_long)
  
  
  fig_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(params$outdir))
  if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) {
    dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  fig_path_svg <- file.path(fig_dir, "roi_metrics.svg")
  fig_path_png <- file.path(fig_dir, "roi_metrics.png")

  save_custom_plot(p, fig_path_svg)
  save_custom_plot(p, fig_path_png)

  knitr::include_graphics(fig_path_png)
}
```

## Target level metrics

```{r target-metrics-fc}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

process_target_metrics <- function(prefix) {
  stats_wide <- load_all_statistics(SDIR, prefix)
  stats_long <- reshape_statistics_long(stats_wide)
  p <- make_violin_plot(stats_long)
  
  fig_dir <- file.path(params$outdir)

  if (!dir.exists(fig_dir)) {
    dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  fig_path_svg <- file.path(fig_dir, paste0(prefix, ".svg"))
  fig_path_png <- file.path(fig_dir, paste0(prefix, ".png"))

  save_custom_plot(p, fig_path_svg)
  save_custom_plot(p, fig_path_png)

  knitr::include_graphics(fig_path_png)
}
```

### Open treed

```{r open-treed-metrics}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Open treed metrics"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| warning: false

open_prefix <- "bytarget_gf_open_treed"
if (!paste0(open_prefix, ".csv") %in% available_stats_files) {
  cat("There are not available open treed stats files.")
} else {
  process_target_metrics(open_prefix)
}
```

### Dense treed

```{r dense-treed-metrics}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Dense treed metrics"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| warning: false

dense_prefix <- "bytarget_gf_dense_treed"
if (!paste0(dense_prefix, ".csv") %in% available_stats_files) {
  cat("There are not available dense treed stats files.")
} else {
  process_target_metrics(dense_prefix)
}
```

### Shruby areas

```{r shrub-metrics}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Shrub metrics"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| warning: false

shrub_prefix <- "bytarget_gf_shrub"
if (!paste0(shrub_prefix, ".csv") %in% available_stats_files) {
  cat("There are not available shrub stats files.")
} else {
  process_target_metrics(shrub_prefix)
}
```

### Road

```{r road-metrics}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Road metrics"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| warning: false

road_prefix <- "bytarget_gf_road"
if (!paste0(road_prefix, ".csv") %in% available_stats_files) {
  cat("There are not available road stats files.")
} else {
  process_target_metrics(road_prefix)
}
```
